title: Garlic Butter Pasta
description: Silky pasta with garlic, butter, parmesan, and black pepper.
steps: Boil pasta in salted water until al dente.
Melt butter in a skillet and cook garlic for about 30 seconds.
Add drained pasta and a splash of pasta water.
Stir in parmesan, salt, and pepper until glossy.
notes: Add parsley or red pepper flakes if you want a little extra color and heat.

title: Blueberry Pancakes
description: Fluffy pancakes with juicy blueberries and a golden edge.
steps: Whisk dry ingredients in a bowl.
Mix eggs and milk, then combine with dry ingredients.
Cook on a buttered griddle until golden on both sides.
notes: Let the batter rest for 5 minutes before cooking for a fluffier texture.
